summary: Iteration 170: Verified PDF visual changes - LIGHT GREY monochromatic palette. All 16 tests passed. Confirmed NO navy/blue colors, proportional logo scaling (120x60 bounding box), and valid PDF generation for invoices, preventivi, and DDT.
critical_code_review_comments: ReportLab PDF colors verified: HEADER_BG=#E8E8E8, ACCENT=#AAAAAA, BODY_TEXT=#555555, TITLE_TEXT=#666666, TOTALE_BG=#E0E0E0
WeasyPrint CSS uses matching grey palette: #555, #666, #888, #e8e8e8, #f7f7f7, #ddd, #ccc, #aaa
NO navy (#0F172A) or blue (#2563EB) colors found in pdf_invoice_modern.py, pdf_template.py, or ddt_pdf_service.py
Logo scaling uses 120x60 bounding box with PIL for proportional dimensions (not hardcoded 150x50)
Table header: grey background (#E8E8E8) with dark grey text (#666666) - NOT white on dark
TOTALE box uses light grey (#E0E0E0) instead of old dark navy (#0F172A)
Old comments in docstrings mention 'navy' but actual code uses grey colors
seed_data_creation: Created synthetic DDT for PDF generation test
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF visual redesign fully verified. All documents use light grey monochromatic palette. Invoice PDF (ReportLab): %PDF-1.4 format, ~64KB. Preventivo PDF (WeasyPrint): %PDF-1.7 format, includes condizioni page. DDT PDF (WeasyPrint): Works with synthetic data. Logo uses PIL for proportional 120x60 bounding box. No dark colors (navy/blue/black) in main color definitions.

test_features_verified.WeasyPrint_CSS_palette: PASSED - CSS uses grey colors, no navy/blue
test_features_verified.No_navy_0F172A_in_source: PASSED - Not found in any PDF service file
test_features_verified.No_blue_2563EB_in_source: PASSED - Not found in any PDF service file
test_features_verified.Logo_proportional_120x60: PASSED - Uses 120x60 bounding box with PIL
test_features_verified.GET_ddt_pdf: PASSED - Returns 200, valid PDF with synthetic data

visual_changes_summary.before: NAVY/BLUE palette - dark colors #0F172A, #2563EB used for headers, totals, accents
visual_changes_summary.after: LIGHT GREY palette - all colors are grey scale (#E8E8E8, #AAAAAA, #555555, #666666, #E0E0E0)
visual_changes_summary.logo: Changed from hardcoded 150x50 to proportional 120x60 bounding box with PIL scaling
